name: Italian Love Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions and pour into a prepared 9 x 13 pan.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the sugar, eggs, vanilla, and ricotta cheese until well mixed.
3. Spoon the mixture onto the cake batter and spread evenly with a knife.
4. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes, or until set.
5. As the cake bakes, the cheese filling will sink to the bottom.
6. For the icing, beat together the pudding, milk, and powdered sugar in a bowl until smooth.
7. Fold in the cool whip until well incorporated.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before spreading the icing evenly over the top.
